General.Name: DT Capital Ltd
General.Description: DT Capital Limited is a publicly owned investment manager; through its subsidiaries, engages in investment holding. It invests in listed and unlisted companies in the Greater China region, Southeast Asia, and Europe in the form of equity or equity-related securities and debt instruments. DT Capital Limited is formerly known as Incutech Investments Limited. DT Capital Limited was founded in 2001 and is based in Central, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Unit D, 6/F Eton Building, Central, Hong Kong
